rule: a default namespace declaration is pruned when the element uses a prefixed name and nothing in scope visibly utilizes the default namespace
provenance: derived from W3C Exclusive XML Canonicalization 1.0 REC (xml-exc-c14n-20020718) §2 rule (the default namespace is not visibly utilized by a prefixed element); expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
